common.consultation: Rest aur paani zyada piyo. 10 din se zyada symptoms rahe ya bukhaar 103°F se upar jaye toh doctor se milein.
48 ghante ke andar antiviral lena zyada effective hota hai. High-risk log turant doctor se milein.
103°F se upar bukhaar, 3 din se zyada, ya rash/gardan akadna ho toh turant doctor ke paas jao.
Antibiotic zaroori hai. Bina treatment ke rheumatic fever ho sakta hai.
10 din se zyada symptoms ho ya kharab ho rahe ho toh ENT specialist se milein.
Chronic bronchitis mein pulmonologist zaroori. Acute 3 hafte mein theek hota hai.
24 ghante pani nahi reh paa raha, blood in stool, ya severe dehydration ho toh doctor ke paas jao.
Urine culture aur antibiotic zaroori. Kidney infection emergency hai.
Bacterial conjunctivitis mein antibiotic drops chahiye. Vision change ho toh doctor se milein.
Baar baar ho toh ENT se milein. Saal mein 7 baar se zyada ho toh tonsillectomy sochein.

chronic.consultation: Endocrinologist se milein. HbA1c har 3 mahine check karein. Lifestyle changes zaroori hain.
BP regularly monitor karo. Dawai band mat karo. Namak aur stress kam karo.
Cardiologist zaroori. Chest pain 15 minute se zyada ho toh emergency.
Cardiologist zaroori. Roz wazan check karo. Dawai band bilkul mat karo.
Pulmonologist zaroori. Smoking band karna sabse effective hai.
Triggers identify karo aur avoid karo. Rescue inhaler hamesha saath rakho.
Endocrinologist se milein. TSH har 6-12 mahine check karo. Lifetime dawai ho sakti hai.
Nephrologist zaroori. GFR aur creatinine regularly check karo.
DEXA scan karwao. Girne se bachao. Calcium aur Vitamin D zaroor lo.
Rheumatologist zaroori. Jaldi treatment se joint damage rokein.

mental_health.consultation: Psychiatrist aur therapist dono zaroori. CBT aur dawai milake best result deta hai.
Psychologist ya psychiatrist se milein. CBT bahut effective hai.
Psychiatrist zaroori. Dawai kabhi achanak band mat karo.
Trauma-focused CBT ya EMDR therapy recommend hai.
Psychiatrist essential hai. Long-term dawai aur community support zaroori.
Psychiatrist ya neurologist se milein. Behavioral therapy saath mein lo.
CBT for insomnia sabse pehle try karo. Long-term neend ki goli se bachein.
ERP therapy gold standard hai. Psychiatrist se dawai lein.
Psychiatrist aur CBT therapy. Breathing techniques seekho.
Multi-disciplinary team zaroori. BMI bahut kam ho toh hospital admission.

skin_eye.consultation: Dermatologist se milein. Triggers avoid karo. Roz moisturize karo.
Dermatologist zaroori. Stress trigger hai, avoid karo.
Moderate-severe acne mein dermatologist se milein.
Ophthalmologist zaroori. IOP regularly monitor karo. Jaldi treatment se andhaapan rokein.
Ophthalmologist se milein. Surgery safe aur effective hai.
Chronic hives mein allergist se milein. Throat swell ho toh emergency.
Screen time kam karo. Humidifier use karo. Chronic ho toh ophthalmologist.
Turant doctor se milein. Tezi se phail raha ho toh emergency.
Sun, alcohol, masaledar khana avoid karo. Sunscreen lagao.
Ophthalmologist aur endocrinologist dono zaroori. Diabetics ko saal mein ek baar aankhein check karwani chahiye.

emergency.consultation: TURANT AMBULANCE BULAO! Aspirin chabo aur wait karo. Har minute mein 1.9 million cells marte hain.
TURANT EMERGENCY CALL KARO! FAST test: Face, Arms, Speech, Time.
EMERGENCY — EpiPen inject karo. Turant ambulance bulao.
MEDICAL EMERGENCY. ICU admission zaroori. 1 ghante ke andar antibiotics shuru karo.
DIABETICS KE LIYE EMERGENCY. Blood sugar check karo. ICU mein admit ho.
MEDICAL EMERGENCY. Bacterial meningitis bina antibiotics ke fatal ho sakta hai.

symptoms: navel pain moving to lower right
emergency.consultation: SURGICAL EMERGENCY. Turant ER mein jao. Phat sakta hai.
MEDICAL EMERGENCY. Surgery ya immobility ke baad risk zyada hota hai.
EMERGENCY agar BP 180/120 se upar ho. Turant hospital jao.
EMERGENCY. Phat sakta hai aur jaan le sakta hai. Turant gynecologist ke paas jao.

cancer.consultation: Oncologist zaroori. Smoking band karo. Jaldi diagnosis se survival rate badh jaata hai.
Oncologist aur breast surgeon zaroori. Mammography regularly karwao.
Hematologist/Oncologist zaroori. Jaldi treatment bahut zaroori hai.
Neurosurgeon aur oncologist dono zaroori. MRI brain scan karwao.
Gastroenterologist aur oncologist zaroori. Colonoscopy karwao.
Urologist aur oncologist zaroori. PSA test regularly karwao.
Gynecologist aur oncologist zaroori. Pap smear regularly karwao. HPV vaccine lagwao.
Gastroenterologist aur oncologist zaroori. Endoscopy karwao.

kidney.consultation: MEDICAL EMERGENCY. Nephrologist zaroori. Dialysis ki zarurat ho sakti hai.
Urologist se milein. Paani zyada piyo (3 litre/din). Namak aur protein kam karo.
Nephrologist zaroori. Protein aur namak kam karo.
Nephrologist zaroori. BP control karna sabse zaroori hai.

liver.consultation: Hepatologist zaroori. Alcohol bilkul band karo. Liver transplant ki zarurat ho sakti hai.
Hepatologist zaroori. Vaccine lagwao. Alcohol avoid karo.
Hepatologist zaroori. Ab 95% cases mein complete cure possible hai.
Gastroenterologist se milein. Weight kam karo, exercise karo, alcohol band karo.
Oncologist aur hepatologist zaroori. Hepatitis control karna prevention hai.

neuro.consultation: Neurologist zaroori. Exercise bahut helpful hai. Support group join karo.
Neurologist aur geriatrician zaroori. Caregiver support bahut zaroori hai.
Neurologist zaroori. Seizure hone par injury se bachao. Driving avoid karo.
Neurologist zaroori. Exercise aur stress management helpful hai.
Neurologist se milein. Triggers identify karo — stress, neend ki kami, khaana.
Geriatrician ya neurologist zaroori. Caregiver support group join karo.

infectious.consultation: Infectious disease specialist zaroori. ART se normal life possible hai. Test karwao.
Pulmonologist zaroori. Poora course complete karo — beech mein band mat karo.
Isolation karo. Oxygen 94% se neeche ho toh turant hospital. Vaccine lagwao.

tropical.consultation: Ibuprofen aur Aspirin BILKUL MAT LO. Platelet count regularly check karo. Hospital admit ho.
Blood test karwao. Antimalarial dawai poori khatam karo. Mosquito se bachao.
Blood culture test karwao. Saaf paani piyo. Vaccine lagwao.
EMERGENCY dehydration. Turant ORS shuru karo. Hospital jao.
Mosquito se bachao. Joint pain kaafi time tak reh sakta hai. Rest karo.
